project.name: Panchsheel Pratishtha
project.description: Ready to move 2 & 3 BHK premium apartments.
project.long_description: Panchsheel Pratishtha is a delivered residential project in Sector 75, Noida. Spread across 5 acres, it comprises 8 towers with 568 units. It offers well-designed 2 and 3 BHK apartments and provides excellent connectivity to Central Noida.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: A stable mid-premium property with an active secondary market and clean RERA compliance.
why_buy: Good connectivity to central Noida hubs.
why_avoid: Premium resale pricing compared to adjacent older properties.

project.name: Gardenia Gateway
project.address: Plot no. 9, Sector 75, Noida, Uttar Pradesh
project.description: Distressed 10-acre legacy asset currently under NCLT insolvency proceedings.
project.long_description: Gardenia Gateway is a distressed 10-acre legacy project under Gardenia India Limited. Mired in legal and financial trouble, it faces an NCLT insolvency petition (June 2025). Unsold flats have been sealed by Noida Authority over ₹103 Crore dues. Capital values have been stagnant for 8 years.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Toxic distressed asset with active NCLT insolvency and Noida Authority sealing orders.
why_avoid: Registries frozen due to ₹103 Cr dues.

project.name: Gardenia Golf City (AIMS Max)
project.description: Massive legacy township plagued by severe builder dues and registry freezes.
project.long_description: Developed by AIMS Max Gardenia Developers, this project owes over ₹1,717 Crore to the Noida Authority. Due to these astronomical defaults, 365 flats remain unregistered. Capital appreciation has been effectively frozen at ₹3800-4000/sq.ft for years.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Extremely high-risk asset trapped by builder insolvency and massive authority dues.
why_avoid: Over ₹1,717 Crore in dues to Noida Authority.
decision_profile.advisor_notes: Unresolved liabilities make this a dead investment.

project.name: JM Aroma
project.address: GH-04, Eco City, Sector 75, Noida, Uttar Pradesh
project.description: Established, fully delivered 3 and 4 BHK project with strong secondary market demand.
project.long_description: JM Aroma is a completed, pre-RERA residential project spanning 5 acres. Handed over in 2015, it provides established living with strong past appreciation. It features clubhouses and views of a national park, and prices range from ₹1.62 Cr to ₹3.12 Cr.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: A stable, mature resale property providing safe community living at a competitive price.

project.name: Apex Athena
project.description: Ready to move premium Greek-themed apartments in Central Noida.
project.long_description: Apex Athena by Apex Buildcon offers 2.5, 3, and 4 BHK premium residences. Spread over 7 acres, it features 6 towers and 629 units. It commands premium resale prices between ₹12,000 to ₹14,000 per sq.ft. owing to its RERA compliance and excellent build quality.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: A highly liquid, beautiful Greek-themed asset offering safe registries and steady rental yield.
decision_profile.best_for: Families looking for aesthetics and safety.
decision_profile.advisor_notes: Strong rental demand makes it a solid hold.

project.name: Maxblis White House
project.description: Ready to move 2, 3, and 4 BHK residential apartments.
project.long_description: Maxblis White House (including Phase II & III) is a delivered project by Maxblis Construction. It features 2, 3, and 4 BHK units with 608 total units. Located close to Sector 50 Metro, it boasts solid infrastructure and environmental solutions.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: A well-located ready-to-move project offering a balanced lifestyle for end-users.
why_avoid: Standard architecture compared to newer luxury projects.
decision_profile.advisor_notes: Check for unit layouts as carpet area efficiency varies.

project.name: AIMS Golf Avenue I & II
project.description: Ready to move 2, 3, and 4 BHK residential apartments by AIMS Group.
project.long_description: AIMS Golf Avenue (Phase I & II) by AIMS Group offers ready-to-move 2 to 4 BHK apartments. Spanning 5 acres with 7 towers, it provides excellent connectivity to central Noida, Fortis Hospital, and City Centre Metro.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: A standard, delivered project that offers affordability relative to its prime Sector 75 location.
decision_profile.advisor_notes: Inspect resale units for wear and tear.

project.name: Dasnac Burj Noida
project.description: Ultra-luxury 3, 4 & 5 BHK duplexes by Dasnac. Features double-height ceilings, smart home automation, and private Jacuzzi balconies.
project.long_description: Dasnac Burj Noida is a low-density, premium residential tower crafted for exclusivity. It features IGBC Gold-rated green elements, pre-installed VRV/VRF air-conditioning, biometric locks, and high ceilings. Structural work is complete, and possession is expected by May 2029.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Dasnac Burj Noida is a niche, limited-edition ultra-luxury tower aimed at high-net-worth individuals.
why_buy: Low Density: Only 131 units in a single tower.
Future-Ready Tech: Fully integrated smart home systems and VRV ACs.
Exclusivity: Premium concierge and valet services.
why_avoid: Smaller land parcel limits sprawling ground-level park space.
decision_profile.best_for: HNI End-users seeking an exclusive, tech-forward address in Central Noida.
decision_profile.advisor_notes: Advise buyers to verify the true usable carpet area vs the base selling price.

persona_profile.motivation_note: Seeking a marquee address with top-tier technology.

recommendation.primary_thesis: The definitive tech-enabled ultra-luxury tower in Sector 75.
recommendation.end_use_thesis: Ideal for those wanting a hotel-like concierge lifestyle.
recommendation.investment_thesis: Not a short-term flip. Buy for status and long-term capital preservation.
recommendation.family_thesis: Secure, but lacks the massive open parks of a 20-acre township.
recommendation.luxury_thesis: Top-tier specs: double height rooms, Jacuzzi balconies, IGBC Gold.
negotiation_leverage: Payment plan flexibility since possession is far out.
recommendation.timeline_advice: Wait for final finishing quality checks before full disbursement.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Better smart home tech and lower density.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Ready to Move, larger land parcel.
competitors.verdict: Ivy County wins for immediate possession; Dasnac Burj wins on tech/exclusivity.
competitors.price_delta_note: Dasnac Burj runs at a premium BSP of ₹18,000/sq.ft.
